hero.title: Build, Sell, And Work Smarter Online.
hero.description: Digital Blueprint Lab creates practical guides, client systems, templates, and AI resources for freelancers, creators, and digital product builders.

about.title: Inside The Lab
about.description1: Digital Blueprint Lab is a modern digital lab focused on practical execution, freelancing systems, AI-assisted workflows, and digital product building.
about.description2: We believe success online is built through systems, execution, and clarity - not fake hype or unrealistic promises.

product.title: Digital Launch Bundle
product.subtitle: A practical digital starter bundle.
product.description: A practical digital starter bundle designed to help beginners understand online work, digital products, client communication, freelancing systems, and modern digital execution.

clientKit.title: DBL Client Kit
clientKit.subtitle: A practical client management system.
clientKit.description: DBL Client Kit is a practical client management system for freelancers and digital service providers. It includes ready-to-use client messages, DBL rules, client handling tools, checklists, and real-world examples.
features: Pricing, revision, delivery, and follow-up templates

catalog.lead: Choose a category and find the right DBL resource for your next step.
catalog.booksBody: Practical digital guides for building skills, systems, and a clearer online direction.
catalog.booksPageLead: Practical guides built to turn digital ideas into organized action.
catalog.toolsBody: Kits, templates, and practical resources designed for cleaner execution.
catalog.toolsPageLead: Practical kits and templates designed for cleaner, more professional digital execution.

simulation.title: Client Communication System
simulation.description: Practice better client communication with real freelance scenarios, ready message templates, and workflow tools from the DBL Client Kit.
simulation.clientMessage: Can you do the full launch page by Friday and keep it inside the original scope?
simulation.builderMessage: I can deliver the core page by Friday. The extra launch assets can be added as a second phase.

systems.title: What DBL Helps You Build
systems.subtitle: Clear resources connected to real products, practical workflows, and upcoming tools.
systems.aiDescription: A coming collection of business prompts with Arabic explanations for freelancers and digital builders.
systems.fsDescription: Ready messages, onboarding steps, scope control, pricing replies, and delivery workflows.
systems.tpDescription: Practical books that turn online work, digital products, and execution into clear steps.
systems.dtDescription: Reusable assets for organizing clients, offers, content, products, and delivery.
systems.pbDescription: Simple execution frameworks for moving from idea to published product without getting stuck.

cta.title: Start Building Your Digital Blueprint Today.
